summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Phase 3 updates. All backend APIs (18 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI testing confirmed all new features are working correctly: Hero with logo (not Hakim), auto-rotating sections, non-sticky header, Login without Hakim image, and Admin Dashboard with 4 main sections.
passed_tests: Landing Page - Hero Section with NASSAQ logo (not Hakim)
Landing Page - Animated AI icon (Sparkles) in hero
Landing Page - Hakim as small circular avatar with speech bubble
Landing Page - Header is NOT sticky (absolute positioning)
Landing Page - Journey Section (رحلة المدرسة) auto-rotates every 2 seconds
Landing Page - AI Section (الذكاء الاصطناعي) auto-rotates every 2 seconds
Landing Page - Ecosystem Section (النظام البيئي) auto-rotates every 2 seconds
Landing Page - Footer with new text (عنصر المستقبل - يوفاي في اس)
Login Page - Two-column design WITHOUT Hakim image
Login Page - Back to Website button (العودة للموقع)
Login Page - Language toggle button (EN/عربي)
Login Page - Successful login with new credentials
Login Page - Redirects to admin dashboard after login
Admin Dashboard - مركز القيادة (Platform Control Center) title
Admin Dashboard - Global Analytics section with 6 KPI cards
Admin Dashboard - Daily Platform Activity section with 4 metrics
Admin Dashboard - Quick Actions section with 4 buttons
Admin Dashboard - AI Operations Panel with 4 operations
Admin Dashboard - Add School dialog opens and creates school
Admin Dashboard - Schools table displays created schools
API: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful
API: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials rejected
API: GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user
API: GET /api/dashboard/stats - Returns platform statistics
API: GET /api/schools - Returns schools list
API: POST /api/schools - Creates new school
API: GET /api/registration-requests - Admin can view requests
API: POST /api/hakim/chat - AI assistant responds

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components and flows working correctly

seed_data_creation: Admin user already seeded from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 testing complete. Landing Page now shows NASSAQ logo in hero (not Hakim), with Hakim appearing as small circular avatar with speech bubbles. All 3 sections (Journey, AI, Ecosystem) auto-rotate every 2 seconds without user interaction. Header is NOT sticky (absolute positioning). Login page has two-column design without Hakim image, with Back to Website and Language toggle buttons. Admin Dashboard is now 'مركز القيادة' (Platform Control Center) with 4 main sections: Global Analytics (6 KPI cards), Daily Platform Activity (4 metrics), Quick Actions (4 buttons), AI Operations Panel (4 operations). Footer shows new text 'عنصر المستقبل - يوفاي في اس'. All APIs tested and working. Admin credentials: info@nassaqapp.com / NassaqAdmin2026!##$$HBJ
